problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: Combining Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
